meaning: n.[医]血管造影术,血管照相术
examples: The rate of CIN in high risk pts undergoing cardiac angiography is comparable after administration of iopamidol-370 or iodixanol-320.
One big advance has been in the use of computed tomography angiography.
The most important thing is that we have to have very good diagnostic angiography.
Advocates say it is possible to see plaque on the arteries with CT angiography.
However, coronary angiography is often used to diagnose exactly what's the cause of the chest pain.
